name: What's the first thing I should do after getting bad legal advice from ChatGPT?
description: See a real lawyer now and ignore ChatGPT advice.[1]

mainEntity.name: What's the first thing I should do after getting bad legal advice from ChatGPT?

acceptedAnswer.text: See a real lawyer now and ignore ChatGPT advice.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Stop relying on it and consult a licensed attorney immediately for verified advice.[1] Discard any AI-generated filings or strategies.[2] Key factors: Time-sensitive deadlines; potential errors compounding; evidence preservation. Document your ChatGPT interactions; explain the situation to counsel for proper guidance. Never act on AI alone.
